positive: A majestic, stylized lion head profile rendered in geometric negative space art. The lion's silhouette is composed of intricate interlocking floral and tribal patterns, giving it a sophisticated, modern, and ancient feel. The color palette is restricted to solid matte black and off-white on a transparent background, creating extreme contrast and punchy graphic design. Centered composition, perfect for apparel printing. Stylized illustration, highly detailed linework, clean vector quality, art deco meets tribal.
